creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Not sure what's going on. Something is up in your system. You might want to 
do a buildworld to make sure. Also, be sure to have all of your installed 
ports and ports tree up to date. If you still get error, follow this: 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
